policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="rawRequestBody" value="@(context.Request.Body != null ? context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true) : string.Empty)" />
    
      @($"[Inbound Setlist.fm MCP] {context.Request.Method} {context.Request.Url}")
      
    
    @{
        if (context.Request.Body == null) { return string.Empty; }
        var body = context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
        var args = body?["params"]?["arguments"] as JObject;
        if (args != null) {
            var toRemove = args.Properties()
                .Where(p =>
                    (p.Value.Type == JTokenType.String && string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.Value.Value())) ||
                    (p.Value.Type == JTokenType.String && p.Value.Value() == "19700101000000") ||
                    (p.Value.Type == JTokenType.String && p.Value.Value() == "Unknown") ||
                    (p.Value.Type == JTokenType.String && p.Value.Value() == "0") ||
                    (p.Value.Type == JTokenType.Integer && p.Value.Value() == 0L) ||
                    (p.Value.Type == JTokenType.Float && p.Value.Value() == 0.0)
                )
                .Select(p => p.Name)
                .ToList();
            foreach (var key in toRemove) {
                args.Remove(key);
            }
            // If artistMbid is present and non-empty, remove artistName to avoid ambiguity
            var mbid = args["artistMbid"]?.Value();
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(mbid)) {
                args.Remove("artistName");
            }
            // Always remove 'date' argument
            args.Remove("date");
        }
        return body?.ToString();
    }
    
      @($"[Inbound Setlist.fm MCP] cleaned body")
      <metadata name="body" value="@(context.Request.Body != null ? context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true) : string.Empty)" />
